mapper.select: /*selectAddCostSizeKey*/ SELECT BA.ADDSIKY, MC.COMCDTX FROM ${schema}.BADDCO BA INNER JOIN ${schema}.MCODEM MC ON BA.ADDSIKY = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'ADDSIKY' AND MC.COUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE BA.SYSCDYN = 'N' GROUP BY BA.ADDSIKY, MC.COMCDTX ORDER BY MC.COMCDOR
SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_ADDCOKY() AS ADDCOKY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /*insertBaddco*/ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BADDCO ( ADDCOKY, ADDSIKY, MINLENG, MAXLENG, MINWIDT, MAXWIDT, ADCOPER, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.addcoky}, ifnull(#{param.addsiky},''), ifnull(#{param.minleng},0), ifnull(#{param.maxleng},0), ifnull(#{param.minwidt},0), ifnull(#{param.maxwidt},0), ifnull(#{param.adcoper},0), #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} )
mapper.update: /*updateBaddco*/ UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.BADDCO SET ADDSIKY = #{param.addsiky} , MINLENG = #{param.minleng}, MAXLENG = #{param.maxleng}, MINWIDT = #{param.minwidt}, MAXWIDT = #{param.maxwidt}, ADCOPER = #{param.adcoper}, CREDATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), CRETIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), CREUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, LMODATE = date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE ADDCOKY = #{param.addcoky} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}
mapper.select: SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BTRCATE() AS BTRCATE FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /*insertBtrcat*/ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BTRCAT ( BTRCATE, BTRCNAM, BTRFBTP, BTRPBTP, TFONLYN, PFONLYN, DFSTDYN, KSGBUN1, KSGBUN2, KSGBUN3, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.btrcate}, #{param.btrcnam}, #{param.btrfbtp}, #{param.btrpbtp}, ifnull(#{param.tfonlyn},'N'), ifnull(#{param.pfonlyn},'N'), ifnull(#{param.dfstdyn},'N'), #{param.ksgbun1}, #{param.ksgbun2}, #{param.ksgbun3}, #{userInfo.useract} ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} )
mapper.select: SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BTRFKEY() AS ADDCOKY FROM DUAL
SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BTRFLSQ() AS BTRFLSQ FROM DUAL
SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BTRPKEY() AS BTRPKEY FROM DUAL
SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BTRPLSQ() AS BTRPLSQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update: /*updateBtrpma*/ UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPMA SET BTRCATE = #{param.btrcate}, BTRPITC = #{param.btrpitc}, BTRPITN = #{param.btrpitn}, BTRPIGB = #{param.btrpigb}, BTRPICT = #{param.btrpict}, STNWEIG = #{param.stnweig}, REGIKEY = #{param.regikey}, BTRPVAF = #{param.btrpvaf}, BTRPITM = #{param.btrpitm}, BTRPCHR = #{param.btrpchr}, BTRPPAY = #{param.btrppay}, BTRPEYN = #{param.btrpeyn}, SIZGBYN = #{param.sizgbyn}, BTRDFYN = #{param.btrdfyn}, BTRPDAF = REPLACE(#{param.btrpdaf}, '-', ''), BTRPDAT = REPLACE(#{param.btrpdat}, '-', ''), LMODATE = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), LMOTIME = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE BTRPKEY = #{param.btrpkey} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}
mapper.sql:
SELECT BF.WAREKEY, BF.BTRCATE, BF.STNWEIG, BF.BTRFITC , BF.BTRFKEY, BF.BTRFCHR, BF.BTRFPAY, BF.BTRFITM , BF.SIZGBYN, BF.BTRFEYN, BF.BTRDFYN, BF.BTRFSTC , BF.BTRFDAF, BF.BTRFDAT FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFMA BF WHERE BF.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
AND (DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdtfrom}, '%Y%m') BETWEEN BF.BTRFDAF AND BF.BTRFDAT OR DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdtto}, '%Y%m') BETWEEN BF.BTRFDAF AND BF.BTRFDAT)
mapper.select: SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BFHDKEY() AS BFHDKEY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /*insertBtrfit*/ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFIT ( DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, BFHDKEY, BFHDCIT, BTRCATE, BTRFITC, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUMKEY, BTRFITN, BTRFIGB, BTRFICT, SKUTHIC, SKULENG, SKUWIDT, SKUWEIG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSWG, RCVDATE, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, ADDCOKY, BTRFKY1, BTRFIT1, BTRFCH1, BTRFCC1, BTRFPA1, BTRFPC1, BTRFEC1, BTRFEP1, BTRFKY2, BTRFIT2, BTRFCH2, BTRFCC2, BTRFPA2, BTRFPC2, BTRFKY3, BTRFIT3, BTRFCH3, BTRFCC3, BTRFPA3, BTRFPC3, BTRFKY4, BTRFIT4, BTRFCH4, BTRFCC4, BTRFPA4, BTRFPC4, HOLICHR, HOLIPAY, TOTITCH, TOTITPA, SURCHCO, ADDCHCO, ADDPACO, ADCMEMO, BTRFCBT, BTRFPAT, SBILLTO, CALWEIG, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.warekey}, #{param.bfhdkey}, #{param.bfhdcit}, #{param.btrcate}, #{param.btrfitc}, #{param.ownerky}, #{param.ownrnam}, #{param.custcod}, #{param.custnam}, #{param.skumkey}, #{param.btrfitn}, #{param.btrfigb}, #{param.btrfict}, #{param.skuthic}, #{param.skuleng}, #{param.skuwidt}, #{param.skuweig}, #{param.grossln}, #{param.grosswd}, #{param.grosswg}, DATE_FORMAT(#{param.rcvdcdt},'%Y%m%d'), #{param.rcvdcky}, #{param.rcvdcit}, #{param.addcoky}, #{param.btrfky1}, #{param.transfer}, #{param.btrfch1}, #{param.btrfcc1}, #{param.btrfpa1}, #{param.btrfpc1}, #{param.btrfec1}, #{param.btrfep1}, #{param.btrfky2}, #{param.loading}, #{param.btrfch2}, #{param.btrfcc2}, #{param.btrfpa2}, #{param.btrfpc2}, #{param.btrfky3}, #{param.selection},#{param.btrfch3}, #{param.btrfcc3}, #{param.btrfpa3}, #{param.btrfpc3}, #{param.btrfky4}, #{param.storage}, #{param.btrfch4}, #{param.btrfcc4}, #{param.btrfpa4}, #{param.btrfpc4}, #{param.holichr}, #{param.holipay}, #{param.totitch}, #{param.totitpa}, #{param.surchco}, #{param.addchco}, #{param.addpaco}, #{param.adcmemo}, #{param.btrfcbt}, #{param.btrfpat}, #{param.sbillto}, #{param.calweig}, #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} )

/*insertBtrfhdFromBtrfit*/ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFHD ( WAREKEY, BFHDKEY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, TRFDFSD, TRFDFWG, TRFDFCH, TRFDFPA, TOORGCH, TOSURCH, TOTCHCO, TOORGPA, TOSURPA, TOTPACO, BFHYYMM, FCDDATE, FCDTIME, FCDUSER, FCVRFYN, FCVDATE, FCVTIME, FCVUSER, FCCFMYN, FCCDATE, FCCTIME, FCCUSER, DFSTDCH, DFSTDPA, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) SELECT BI.WAREKEY, BI.BFHDKEY, MV.VOWNKEY, WH.VEHICKY , #{param.trfdfsd} AS TRFDFSD , ( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE #{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) END ) AS TRFDFWG , FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BTRFCHR, BI.BTRFCH1) END / 1000 ) AS TRFDFCH , FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN BM.DFSTDYN = 'Y' THEN BM.BTRFPAY END), MAX(BI.BTRFPA1)) END / 1000 ) AS TRFDFPA , ( SUM(BI.TOTITCH) + FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BTRFCHR, BI.BTRFCH1) END / 1000 ) ) AS TOORGCH , SUM(BI.SURCHCO + BI.ADDCHCO) AS TOSURCH , ( SUM(BI.TOTITCH + BI.SURCHCO + BI.ADDCHCO) + FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BTRFCHR, BI.BTRFCH1) END / 1000 ) ) AS TOTCHCO , ( SUM(BI.TOTITPA) + FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BTRFPAY, BI.BTRFPA1) END / 1000 ) ) AS TOORGPA , SUM(BI.ADDPACO) AS TOSURPA , ( SUM(BI.TOTITPA + BI.ADDPACO) + FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trfdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trfdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN BM.DFSTDYN = 'Y' THEN BM.BTRFPAY END), MAX(BI.BTRFPA1)) END / 1000 ) ) AS TOTPACO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMM") AS BFHYYMM , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD") AS FCDDATE , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS") AS FCDTIME , #{userInfo.useract}, #{param.fcvrfyn}, IFNULL(#{param.fcvdate}, ''), IFNULL(#{param.fcvtime}, '') , IFNULL(#{param.fcvuser}, ''), #{param.fccfmyn}, IFNULL(#{param.fccdate}, ''), IFNULL(#{param.fcctime}, '') , IFNULL(#{param.fccuser}, '') , COALESCE ( ( SELECT BTRFCHR FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFMA B WHERE B.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND B.BTRFITM = BI.BTRFIT1 AND B.BTRCATE = ( CASE WHEN (MIN(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MIN(BI.BTRCATE) WHEN (MAX(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MAX(BI.BTRCATE) ELSE BI.BTRCATE END ) AND B.BTRFITC = BI.BTRFITC AND B.BTRDFYN = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdt},'%Y%m') BETWEEN B.BTRFDAF AND B.BTRFDAT ), BI.BTRFCH1) AS BTRFCHR , COALESCE ( ( SELECT IFNULL(BS.BSIZPAY, B.BTRFPAY) FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFMA B INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BTRCAT BC ON BC.BTRCATE = B.BTRCATE AND DFSTDYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BSIZPA BS ON BS.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND BS.BTRNKEY = B.BTRFKEY AND BS.ADDSIKY = BA.ADDSIKY AND B.SIZGBYN = 'Y' WHERE B.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND B.BTRFITM = BI.BTRFIT1 AND B.BTRCATE = ( CASE WHEN (MIN(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MIN(BI.BTRCATE) WHEN (MAX(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MAX(BI.BTRCATE) ELSE BI.BTRCATE END ) AND B.BTRFITC = BI.BTRFITC AND B.BTRDFYN = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdt},'%Y%m') BETWEEN B.BTRFDAF AND B.BTRFDAT ), MIN(BI.BTRFPA1)) AS BTRFPAY , #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFIT BI LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BC.BTRCATE, BC.DFSTDYN, BF.BTRFCHR, BF.BTRFPAY, BF.BTRFKEY, BF.WAREKEY, BF.BTRFITC, BF.BTRFDAF, BF.BTRFDAT FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRCAT BC INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BTRFMA BF ON BF.BTRCATE = BC.BTRCATE AND BF.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BC.DFSTDYN = 'Y' AND BC.TFONLYN = 'N' AND DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdt},'%Y%m') BETWEEN BF.BTRFDAF AND BF.BTRFDAT GROUP BY BC.BTRCATE, BC.DFSTDYN, BF.BTRFCHR, BF.BTRFPAY, BF.BTRFKEY, BF.WAREKEY, BF.BTRFITC, BF.BTRFDAF, BF.BTRFDAT ) BM ON BM.BTRCATE = BI.BTRCATE AND BM.BTRFKEY = BI.BTRFKY1 AND BM.BTRFITC = BI.BTRFITC INNER JOIN ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = BI.BTRFPAT INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.WRCVHD WH ON WH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND WH.RCVDCKY = BI.RCVDCKY AND WH.DOCCATE = '400' AND WH.DOCTYPE != '490' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MM ON MM.VOWNKEY = BI.BTRFPAT AND MM.VEHICKY = WH.VEHICKY INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'VHCTNCD' AND MC.COMCDVL = MM.VHCTNCD INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BADDCO BA ON BA.ADDCOKY = BI.ADDCOKY WHERE BI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BI.BFHDKEY = #{param.bfhdkey} GROUP BY BI.WAREKEY, BI.BFHDKEY, MV.VOWNKEY, WH.VEHICKY , MC.CDATTR1
mapper.sql:
SELECT BP.WAREKEY, BP.BTRCATE, BP.BTRPKEY, BP.REGIKEY , BP.BTRPITC, BP.BTRPITM, BP.BTRPITN, BP.BTRPIGB , BP.BTRPICT, BP.STNWEIG, BP.BTRPVAF, BP.BTRPCHR , BP.BTRPPAY, BP.BTRPEYN, BP.SIZGBYN, BP.BTRDFYN FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPMA BP WHERE BP.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
AND (DATE_FORMAT(#{param.bildatefrom}, '%Y%m') BETWEEN BP.BTRPDAF AND BP.BTRPDAT OR DATE_FORMAT(#{param.bildatefrom}, '%Y%m') BETWEEN BP.BTRPDAF AND BP.BTRPDAT)
mapper.insert: /* insertBtrpitList */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPIT ( WAREKEY, BPHDKEY, BPHDCIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BPCHKEY, BPPAKEY, BTRCATE, BTRPITC, BTRPITN, BTRPICT, BTRPIGB, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUTHIC, SKULENG, SKUWIDT, SKUWEIG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSWG, CALWEIG, TRNINDT, TRNINTM, REGIORG, REGIMOD, ADDCOKY, BTRPITM, BTRPCHR, BTRPCCO, BTRPPAY, BTRPPCO, BTRPECC, BTRPEPC, SURCHCO, ADDCHCO, ADDPACO, HOLICHR, HOLIPAY, ADCMEMO, BTRPCBT, BTRPPAT, SBILLTO, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT, TOTITCH, TOTITPA, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.warekey}, #{param.bphdkey}, #{param.bphdcit}, #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.bpchkey}, #{param.bppakey}, #{param.btrcate}, #{param.btrpitc}, #{param.btrpitn}, #{param.btrpict}, #{param.btrpigb}, #{param.ownerky}, #{param.ownrnam}, #{param.custcod}, #{param.custnam}, #{param.skumkey}, #{param.skuthic}, #{param.skuleng}, #{param.skuwidt}, #{param.skuweig}, #{param.grossln}, #{param.grosswd}, #{param.grosswg}, #{param.calweig}, #{param.trnindt}, #{param.trnintm}, #{param.regiorg}, #{param.regimod}, #{param.addcoky}, #{param.btrpitm}, #{param.btrpchr}, #{param.btrpcco}, #{param.btrppay}, #{param.btrppco}, #{param.btrpecc}, #{param.btrpepc}, #{param.surchco}, #{param.addchco}, #{param.addpaco}, #{param.holichr}, #{param.holipay}, #{param.adcmemo}, #{param.btrpcbt}, #{param.btrppat}, #{param.sbillto}, #{param.vhplnky}, #{param.vhplnit}, #{param.totitch}, #{param.totitpa}, #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} )

/* insertBtrphdFromBtrpit */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPHD ( WAREKEY, BPHDKEY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY , TRPDFSD, TRPDFWG, TRPDFCH, TRPDFPA , DFSTDCH, DFSTDPA, TOORGCH, TOSURCH , TOTCHCO, TOORGPA, TOSURPA, TOTPACO , BPHYYMM, PCDDATE, PCDTIME, PCDUSER , PCVRFYN, PCVDATE, PCVTIME, PCVUSER , PCCFMYN, PCCDATE, PCCTIME, PCCUSER , CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER , PAYADYN ) SELECT BI.WAREKEY, BI.BPHDKEY, BI.BTRPPAT, VH.VEHICKY , #{param.trpdfsd} AS TRPDFSD , ( CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE #{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) END ) AS TRPDFWG
, FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) OR TH.DOCTYPE != '810' THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BM.BTRPCHR, BI.BTRPCHR) END / 1000 ) AS TRPDFCH , FLOOR( CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN BM.DFSTDYN = 'Y' THEN BM.BTRPPAY END), MAX(BI.BTRPPAY)) END / 1000 ) AS TRPDFPA , COALESCE ( ( SELECT B.BTRPCHR FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPMA B WHERE B.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND B.BTRPITM = BI.BTRPITM AND B.BTRPKEY = BI.BPCHKEY AND B.BTRCATE = ( CASE WHEN (MIN(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MIN(BI.BTRCATE) WHEN (MAX(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MAX(BI.BTRCATE) ELSE BI.BTRCATE END ) AND B.BTRPITC = BI.BTRPITC AND B.BTRDFYN = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(#{param.poshpdt},'%Y%m') BETWEEN B.BTRPDAF AND B.BTRPDAT), BI.BTRPCHR ) AS DFSTDCH , COALESCE ( ( SELECT B.BTRPPAY FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPMA B WHERE B.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND B.BTRPITM = BI.BTRPITM AND B.BTRPKEY = BI.BPPAKEY AND B.BTRCATE = ( CASE WHEN (MIN(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MIN(BI.BTRCATE) WHEN (MAX(BI.BTRCATE) = MAX(BM.BTRCATE)) THEN MAX(BI.BTRCATE) ELSE BI.BTRCATE END ) AND B.BTRPITC = BI.BTRPITC AND B.BTRDFYN = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(#{param.trncpdt},'%Y%m') BETWEEN B.BTRPDAF AND B.BTRPDAT) , BI.BTRPPAY ) AS DFSTDPA , (SUM(BI.TOTITCH - BI.SURCHCO) + FLOOR(CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) OR TH.DOCTYPE != '810' THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BM.BTRPCHR, BI.BTRPCHR) END / 1000)) AS TOORGCH , SUM(BI.SURCHCO + BI.ADDCHCO) AS TOSURCH , (SUM(BI.TOTITCH + BI.ADDCHCO) + FLOOR(CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) OR TH.DOCTYPE != '810' THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * IFNULL(BM.BTRPCHR, BI.BTRPCHR) END / 1000)) AS TOTCHCO , (SUM(BI.TOTITPA) + FLOOR(CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN BM.DFSTDYN = 'Y' THEN BM.BTRPPAY END), MAX(BI.BTRPPAY)) END / 1000) ) AS TOORGPA , SUM(BI.ADDPACO) AS TOSURPA , (SUM(BI.TOTITPA + BI.ADDPACO) + FLOOR(CASE WHEN #{param.trpdfsd} < SUM(BI.${param.calweig}) THEN 0 ELSE (#{param.trpdfsd} - SUM(BI.${param.calweig})) * COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN BM.DFSTDYN = 'Y' THEN BM.BTRPPAY END), MAX(BI.BTRPPAY)) END / 1000) ) AS TOTPACO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMM") AS BPHYYMM , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD") AS PCDDATE , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS") AS PCDTIME , #{userInfo.useract}, #{param.pcvrfyn}, IFNULL(#{param.pcvdate}, ''), IFNULL(#{param.pcvtime}, '') , IFNULL(#{param.pcvuser}, ''), #{param.pccfmyn}, IFNULL(#{param.pccdate}, ''), IFNULL(#{param.pcctime}, '') , IFNULL(#{param.pccuser}, '') , #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD"), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS"), #{userInfo.useract} , TH.PAYADYN FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPIT BI INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD TH ON TH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND TH.VHPLNKY = BI.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNIT TI ON TI.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND TI.VHPLNKY = BI.VHPLNKY AND TI.VHPLNIT = BI.VHPLNIT AND TI.SKUMKEY = BI.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = BI.BTRPPAT INNER JOIN ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVHCMA VH ON VH.VOWNKEY = BI.BTRPPAT AND VH.VEHICKY = TH.VEHICKY INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'VHCTNCD' AND MC.COMCDVL = VH.VHCTNCD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BC.BTRCATE, BC.DFSTDYN, BP.BTRPCHR, MAX(IFNULL(BS.BSIZPAY,BP.BTRPPAY)) AS BTRPPAY, BP.BTRPKEY, BP.WAREKEY, BP.BTRPITC, BP.BTRPDAF, BP.BTRPDAT, BP.BTRPVAF, BS.ADDSIKY FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPMA BP INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BTRCAT BC ON BP.BTRCATE = BC.BTRCATE AND BC.DFSTDYN = 'Y' AND BC.PFONLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BSIZPA BS ON BS.WAREKEY = BP.WAREKEY AND BS.BTRNKEY = BP.BTRPKEY WHERE BP.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BP.BTRDFYN = 'Y' GROUP BY BC.BTRCATE, BC.DFSTDYN, BP.BTRPCHR, BTRPPAY, BP.BTRPKEY, BP.WAREKEY, BP.BTRPITC, BP.BTRPDAF, BP.BTRPDAT, BP.BTRPVAF, BS.ADDSIKY ) BM ON BM.BTRCATE = BI.BTRCATE AND BM.BTRPKEY = BI.BPCHKEY AND BM.BTRPKEY = BI.BPPAKEY AND BM.ADDSIKY = BI.ADDCOKY AND BM.BTRPVAF = MV.VOWAFFI WHERE BI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BI.BPHDKEY = #{param.bphdkey} GROUP BY BI.WAREKEY, BI.BPHDKEY, MV.VOWNKEY, VH.VEHICKY

/* insertBppahdList */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BPPAHD ( WAREKEY , VHPLNKY , VOWNKEY , VEHICKY, TRPDFSD , TRPDFWG , DFSTDPA , TRPDFPA, TOORGPA , TOSURPA , TOTPACO , BPHYYMM, BPHMEMO , PCDDATE , PCDTIME , PCDUSER, PCVRFYN , PCVDATE , PCVTIME , PCVUSER, PCCFMYN , PCCDATE , PCCTIME , PCCUSER, PAYADYN , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) SELECT BH.WAREKEY , BI.VHPLNKY , BH.VOWNKEY , BH.VEHICKY, BH.TRPDFSD , BH.TRPDFWG , BH.DFSTDPA , BH.TRPDFPA, BH.TOORGPA , BH.TOSURPA , BH.TOTPACO , BH.BPHYYMM, BH.BPHMEMO , BH.PCDDATE , BH.PCDTIME , BH.PCDUSER, BH.PCVRFYN , BH.PCVDATE , BH.PCVTIME , BH.PCVUSER, BH.PCCFMYN , BH.PCCDATE , BH.PCCTIME , BH.PCCUSER, BH.PAYADYN , BH.CREUSER , BH.LMODATE , BH.LMOTIME, BH.LMOUSER FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPHD BH INNER JOIN ( SELECT WAREKEY , BPHDKEY, VHPLNKY FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND BPHDKEY = #{param.bphdkey} GROUP BY WAREKEY, VHPLNKY , BPHDKEY) BI ON BI.WAREKEY = BH.WAREKEY AND BI.BPHDKEY = BH.BPHDKEY WHERE BH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BH.BPHDKEY = #{param.bphdkey} AND BI.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}

/* insertBppaitList */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.BPPAIT ( WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BPCHKEY, BTRCATE, BTRPITC, BTRPITN, BTRPICT, BTRPIGB, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUTHIC, SKULENG, SKUWIDT, SKUWEIG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSWG, CALWEIG, TRNINDT, TRNINTM, REGIORG, REGIMOD, ADDCOKY, BTRPITM, BTRPPAY, BTRPPCO, BTRPEPC, HOLICHR, HOLIPAY, SURCHCO, ADDPACO, TOTITPA, ADCMEMO, BTRPCBT, BTRPPAT, SBILLTO, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) SELECT WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BPCHKEY, BTRCATE, BTRPITC, BTRPITN, BTRPICT, BTRPIGB, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUTHIC, SKULENG, SKUWIDT, SKUWEIG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSWG, CALWEIG, TRNINDT, TRNINTM, REGIORG, REGIMOD, ADDCOKY, BTRPITM, BTRPPAY, BTRPPCO, BTRPEPC, HOLICHR, HOLIPAY, SURCHCO, ADDPACO, TOTITPA, ADCMEMO, BTRPCBT, BTRPPAT, SBILLTO, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRPIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND BPHDKEY = #{param.bphdkey} AND VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}
mapper.update: UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD SET PAYADYN = ifnull(#{param.payadmd},'N'), UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND UPDTCHK = (SELECT UPDTCHK FROM ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky})
mapper.select: SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_BM_BPHDKEY() AS BPHDKEY FROM DUAL
